mapper.select: SELECT A.email,B.employee_id employeeId FROM `md_user` A INNER JOIN md_company_users B ON A.email = B.email AND B.is_on_job = 0 WHERE A.email != '' AND A.email IS NOT NULL

SELECT *FROM `md_company_users` WHERE dept_name=(SELECT dept_name FROM md_company_users WHERE email=#{email} LIMIT 1) AND (post_name LIKE '%主任%'OR post_name LIKE '%院长%'OR post_name LIKE '%部长%' OR post_name LIKE '%经理%'OR post_name LIKE '%总监%' OR post_name LIKE '%主管%') AND is_on_job=1 AND office_name='' UNION ALL SELECT *FROM `md_company_users` WHERE dept_name=(SELECT dept_name FROM md_company_users WHERE email=#{email} LIMIT 1) AND is_leader=1
